case_title: MARIN CO. PUBLIC ADMIN. ESTATE OF DONNELLY,CARL F. VS LEVINSON, PETER G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MARIN CO. PUBLIC ADMIN. ESTATE OF DONNELLY,CARL F. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVINSON, PETER G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CERT MAIL TO PETER G. LEVINSON RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIN CO. PUBLIC ADMIN. ESTATE OF DONNELLY,CARL F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVINSON, PETER G. $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,820.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEVINSON, PETER G.
